events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the joint **passes** — hardened washers, witness lines, correct thread projection (1-3 threads past nut), correct spiral-wound gasket per line class, and a documented star-pattern multi-pass torque sequence all align with ASME PCC-1/B16.5 practice. Low risk; the only recommended follow-up is confirming the record captures a final full-value verification pass per PCC-1 Appendix O.
